name: Huskar
description: Those who are given more in life must not cling to it but risk it all at every moment.

abilities.name: Blood Magic
abilities.description: Huskar does not have mana. Mana cost of all sources are converted to health cost for the Sacred Warrior.

abilities.name: Inner Fire
abilities.description: In a fiery rage, Huskar pushes all nearby enemy units away to a fixed distance, silences and damages them.

abilities.name: Burning Spear
abilities.description: Ignites his spears aflame with his health, dealing damage over time with his regular attack. Multiple attacks will stack additional damage. Grants additional range when manually casting the ability.

abilities.name: Berserker's Blood
abilities.description: Huskar's injuries feed his power, giving increased attack speed, magic resistance and health regeneration based on missing health. Grants health regeneration bonus based on a percentage of Huskar's health. Applies a Basic Dispel on Huskar. After a short delay, the ability health cost is applied as a heal, along with a bonus for each debuff dispelled this way.

abilities.name: Life Break
abilities.description: Taunts the affected enemy unit to attack Huskar. Increases cast range. Ends at the secondary target's location. Deals 53.76%/61.56%/68.64% of as self-damage.
